map.lesson_ap_cost.name: Lesson: Move, Then Act
map.lesson_ap_cost.hint: This level: each hero's turn is move first (one committed move), then ONE action — a skill or a rest. Once you act, you can't reposition, so pick your tile before you swing.
map.lesson_opportunity_attack.name: Lesson: Position Before You Strike
map.lesson_opportunity_attack.hint: This level: acting ends that hero's turn — there is no retreating after the hit lands, so the tile you strike from is the tile you get hit on. Read the red telegraph tiles on the board first (and the ①②③ resolution order) — they update live as you reposition — then move somewhere both in range and off the red tiles before you commit.
map.lesson_push_abyss.name: Lesson: Push into the Abyss
map.lesson_push_abyss.hint: This level: Cloud-Parting Palm can shove a monster straight into a hazard tile for an instant kill — a monster doesn't survive the fall the way a hero would.
map.lesson_healer.name: Lesson: Using a Healer
map.lesson_healer.hint: This level: Bai Zhi's heals are what let Li Yan keep tanking and blocking. Watch the HP bar — healing at the right moment is what wins this one, not just hitting harder.
map.lesson_poison_mist.name: Lesson: Poison Mist Terrain
map.lesson_poison_mist.hint: This level: that green mist chips anyone standing on it at turn's end, monster included. The ghost's route crosses it, so it's already weakened before you land the finishing blow.

ui.instruction_idle: Click a character, then click a highlighted tile to move, or a skill button below.
ui.instruction_armed: Click a highlighted tile to aim, or click the skill again to cancel.
ui.last_wave_reminder: Final turn! You don't need to kill everything — survive this turn with the base alive and you win.
ui.outcome_wipe: Squad wiped out! Restarting from wave 1.
ui.outcome_defeat: The base fell! Restarting from wave 1.
ui.outcome_victory: Held the line! Every wave survived.
ui.campaign_grid_hint: Carried across the whole campaign — at zero the campaign ends.
ui.campaign_over: CAMPAIGN OVER — the grid has fallen
